languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

languages.text: "Провидение Омниссии не свело нас. Этот храм весьма велик и нет ничего удивительного в том, что двое ученых мужей ни разу не столкнулись друг с другом. В конце концов, каждый из нас благословлен своей функцией и выполнять ее — одинокий труд".

"The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."
languages.original_text: "Провидение Омниссии не свело нас. Этот храм весьма велик и нет ничего удивительного в том, что двое ученых мужей ни разу не столкнулись друг с другом. В конце концов, каждый из нас благословлен своей функцией и выполнять ее — одинокий труд".

"The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

"The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

languages.text: «La providencia del Omnissiah no nos reunió. El templo es de gran tamaño y no es de extrañar que dos de sus estudiosos no se hayan conocido. Después de todo, cada uno de nosotros está bendito con su propia función y cumplirla es un esfuerzo solitario».
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

traits.locale_text: «La providencia del Omnissiah no nos reunió. El templo es de gran tamaño y no es de extrañar que dos de sus estudiosos no se hayan conocido. Después de todo, cada uno de nosotros está bendito con su propia función y cumplirla es un esfuerzo solitario».

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚的眷顾并没有让我们相遇。那座神殿非常庞大，两位学者从未谋面也不足为奇。毕竟，我们每个人都蒙赐了各自的职能，而履行职能往往是孤独的。”
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚的眷顾并没有让我们相遇。那座神殿非常庞大，两位学者从未谋面也不足为奇。毕竟，我们每个人都蒙赐了各自的职能，而履行职能往往是孤独的。”

languages.text: « Il n'était pas dans les plans de l'Omnimessie que nos chemins se croisent. Le temple est immense, il n'y a donc rien de surprenant à ce que deux érudits ne s'y soient jamais rencontrés. Après tout, chacun d'entre nous a sa propre fonction sacrée, qui requiert un effort solitaire. »
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'était pas dans les plans de l'Omnimessie que nos chemins se croisent. Le temple est immense, il n'y a donc rien de surprenant à ce que deux érudits ne s'y soient jamais rencontrés. Après tout, chacun d'entre nous a sa propre fonction sacrée, qui requiert un effort solitaire. »

languages.text: "Die Fügung des Omnissiah hat uns nicht zusammengeführt. Der Tempel ist recht groß, und es ist keine Überraschung, dass sich zwei gelehrte Männer nie begegnet sind. Schließlich ist jeder von uns mit einer eigenen Funktion gesegnet, deren Erfüllung oberste Priorität hat."
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

traits.locale_text: "Die Fügung des Omnissiah hat uns nicht zusammengeführt. Der Tempel ist recht groß, und es ist keine Überraschung, dass sich zwei gelehrte Männer nie begegnet sind. Schließlich ist jeder von uns mit einer eigenen Funktion gesegnet, deren Erfüllung oberste Priorität hat."

languages.text: "オムニサイア "の摂理が私たちを引き合わせたのではない。神殿は非常に広大であり、学識ある二人が一度も交わることがなかったとしても不思議ではない。結局のところ、私たちはそれぞれ自分の機能に恵まれており、その機能を果たすことは孤独な努力なのです"
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

languages.text: "Hermesih'in takdiri bizi bir araya getirmedi. Tapınak oldukça büyük ve iki bilginin yollarının bir kez bile kesişmemesine şaşmamak gerek. Ne de olsa her birimiz, kendi işlevimizle kutsanmışızdır ve bu işlevi yerine getirmek de tek kişilik bir çabadır."
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah's providence did not bring us together. The temple is quite vast and it is no surprise that two learned men never once crossed paths. After all, each of us is blessed with our own function and fulfilling that function is a solitary effort."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in takdiri bizi bir araya getirmedi. Tapınak oldukça büyük ve iki bilginin yollarının bir kez bile kesişmemesine şaşmamak gerek. Ne de olsa her birimiz, kendi işlevimizle kutsanmışızdır ve bu işlevi yerine getirmek de tek kişilik bir çabadır."
